# HelloTools

HelloTools is a premium, 100% free collection of utility calculators and text processing tools. Every single tool runs client-side inside the user's web browser, guaranteeing that input data is never sent to external servers or logged. There are no signups, no fees, and no software installations required.

## Core Features
- **Zero Data Logging**: Absolute security and privacy.
- **Blazing Fast**: JavaScript-based instant computations.
- **Responsive Layout**: Seamless mobile, tablet, and desktop views.

## Available Tools by Category

### Finance Calculators

- [EMI / Loan Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/emi-calculator): Calculate your monthly loan payments instantly. Enter principal, interest rate, and tenure. Free emi calculator — no signup, no download required. Get instan...
- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/compound-interest-calculator): Calculate your compound interest earnings instantly. Enter principal, rate, time, and frequency. Free compound interest calculator — no signup, no download r...
- [Simple Interest Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/simple-interest-calculator): Calculate your simple interest yields instantly. Enter principal sum, rate, and time. Free simple interest calculator — no signup, no download required.
- [Mortgage Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/mortgage-calculator): Calculate your monthly mortgage costs instantly. Enter home value, down payment, and mortgage rate. Free mortgage calculator — no signup, no download required.
- [Salary Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/salary-calculator): Calculate your salary conversions instantly. Enter hourly wage or annual earnings. Free salary calculator — no signup, no download required. Get instant sala...
- [Tax Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/tax-calculator): Calculate your income tax liabilities instantly. Enter gross annual income and deductions. Free tax calculator — no signup, no download required. Get instant...
- [Discount / Sale Price Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/discount-calculator): Calculate your shopping discounts instantly. Enter original price, discount percent, and tax rate. Free discount calculator — no signup, no download required.
- [Tip Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/tip-calculator): Calculate your restaurant bill splits instantly. Enter bill total, tip rate, and guest count. Free tip calculator — no signup, no download required. Get inst...
- [Retirement Savings Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/retirement-calculator): Calculate your retirement nest eggs instantly. Enter current age, target age, savings, and contributions. Free retirement calculator — no signup, no download...
- [Currency Converter](https://hellotools.net/tools/currency-converter): Calculate your currency exchanges instantly. Enter source currency, target currency, and amount. Free currency converter — no signup, no download required.

- [Scientific Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/scientific-calculator): Calculate your algebraic equations instantly. Enter mathematical operations and expressions. Free scientific calculator — no signup, no download required.
- [Fraction Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/fraction-calculator): Calculate your fraction operations instantly. Enter numerators, denominators, and operators. Free fraction calculator — no signup, no download required.
- [Average / Mean Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/average-calculator): Calculate your mean and stats instantly. Enter comma-separated list of numbers. Free average calculator — no signup, no download required. Get instant mean a...
- [Square Root Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/square-root-calculator): Calculate your radical calculations instantly. Enter base number and root degree. Free square root calculator — no signup, no download required. Get instant ...
- [Random Number Generator](https://hellotools.net/tools/random-number-generator): Calculate your random number lists instantly. Enter minimum bound, maximum bound, and count. Free random number generator — no signup, no download required.
- [Number to Words Converter](https://hellotools.net/tools/number-to-words-converter): Calculate your number spellings instantly. Enter integer or decimal digits. Free number to words converter — no signup, no download required. Get instant num...

- [Text Reverser](https://hellotools.net/tools/text-reverser): Calculate your text reversals instantly. Enter text strings and reversal modes. Free text reverser — no signup, no download required. Get instant text revers...
- [Remove Duplicate Lines](https://hellotools.net/tools/remove-duplicate-lines): Calculate your list deduplications instantly. Enter lists of text lines. Free remove duplicate lines — no signup, no download required. Get instant list dedu...
- [Text Sorter](https://hellotools.net/tools/text-sorter): Calculate your list sorting calculations instantly. Enter list text lines and sorting parameters. Free text sorter — no signup, no download required. Get ins...
- [Whitespace Remover](https://hellotools.net/tools/whitespace-remover): Calculate your text spacing cleanups instantly. Enter raw text block inputs. Free whitespace remover — no signup, no download required. Get instant text spac...
- [Word Frequency Counter](https://hellotools.net/tools/word-frequency-counter): Calculate your keyword density analysis instantly. Enter text documents and word settings. Free word frequency counter — no signup, no download required.
- [Palindrome Checker](https://hellotools.net/tools/palindrome-checker): Calculate your palindrome verifications instantly. Enter word or sentence strings. Free palindrome checker — no signup, no download required. Get instant pal...
- [Readability Score Checker](https://hellotools.net/tools/readability-checker): Calculate your readability grade checks instantly. Enter raw copy or draft paragraphs. Free readability checker — no signup, no download required. Get instan...

- [Body Fat Percentage Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/body-fat-calculator): Calculate your body fat calculations instantly. Enter gender, height, neck, and waist dimensions. Free body fat calculator — no signup, no download required.
- [Pregnancy Due Date Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/pregnancy-calculator): Calculate your pregnancy timeline projects instantly. Enter last menstrual period date and cycle days. Free pregnancy due date calculator — no signup, no dow...
- [Ovulation Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/ovulation-calculator): Calculate your fertile window timelines instantly. Enter last period start date and cycle duration. Free ovulation calculator — no signup, no download required.
- [Water Intake Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/water-intake-calculator): Calculate your daily hydration targets instantly. Enter body weight and daily exercise time. Free water intake calculator — no signup, no download required.
- [Ideal Weight Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/ideal-weight-calculator): Calculate your ideal weight estimations instantly. Enter gender, height, and formula comparison. Free ideal weight calculator — no signup, no download required.
- [Macronutrient Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/macro-calculator): Calculate your macro splits instantly. Enter daily calories, weight goals, and diet types. Free macronutrient calculator — no signup, no download required.
- [Running Pace Calculator](https://hellotools.net/tools/running-pace-calculator): Calculate your running pace calculations instantly. Enter distance, time, and pace values. Free running pace calculator — no signup, no download required.
